V20 predator world

Pearl Snake

A full neon snake arena with tactical bots, boost energy, roaming pearls, live ranking and a world that keeps moving around you.

Hunt
Cut across rival paths and collect the pearls they drop.
Grow
Every pearl extends your body and raises your score.
Boost
Hold mouse or Space for speed, but watch your energy.

Snake loadout

CYAN: speed gateLIME: growth gatePINK: score gate

Controls: move with mouse or touch. Hold click, touch or Space to boost. Cross energy gates, chain pearls and survive every rival trail.

Master the Infinity Arcade

V20 release file

PROFILEShared XP, levels, daily missions and achievements react to real play.
ARENASSimple hunt/run/power AI with predictive danger routing.
CASINOTwo visual floors, live results, cards, roulette, dice and machines.
ACCESSMotion, contrast, sound, shake and adaptive laptop controls.

Pearl.io tactics

Farm early, keep an escape angle and split only when you have room to recover.

Snake tactics

Boost to intercept. Gates restore momentum and close calls build score.

Bot language

Hunt cuts routes. Run samples safe angles. Power seeks resources.

World events

Bounty Rush, Pearl Storm and Gate Frenzy change the best strategy.

Performance

AUTO steps heavy effects down if frame rate remains low.
